task_description: Add per-rule group filtering via auto-discovered groups from notifications. Users can select specific WhatsApp/messaging groups for each rule using checkboxes in the rule editor. Groups are auto-discovered from incoming notifications (no manual name typing needed). If no groups are selected, rule applies to all (preserving current behavior). ReplyGuard and dedup logic must not be touched.

verification.summary: Build succeeds (assembleDebug). No tests exist in this project (no test files). ReplyGuard.kt confirmed unchanged via git diff. All 14 files modified/created compile cleanly. Post-review fix applied: upsert/read race condition eliminated by combining operations into single runBlocking block.

review_fixes_applied.issue: Upsert/read race on first group contact
review_fixes_applied.fix: Combined fire-and-forget scope.launch upsert and separate runBlocking read into a single runBlocking block that does upsert then getByConversationKey sequentially
Left as-is: pruneOld is never called in practice (infrastructure only), so no actual stale-ID problem exists
Left as-is: Room queries are sub-millisecond for indexed lookups, acceptable for current traffic patterns. Known future optimization opportunity.
